headline: Amazom Introduces Same-Hour Drone Delivery Of Your Regrets, Anxiety, And Poor Life Choices
summary: The new 'RegretElite' service promises to deliver existential dread to your doorstep in under 45 minutes.
fullBody: Amazom has announced a groundbreaking new delivery service called RegretElite, which specializes in same-hour drone delivery of your worst life decisions, deepest anxieties, and most embarrassing memories. The service works by connecting to your social media history, browser cache, and 'the look your parents gave you that one time.' Customers can expect to receive their existential dread via autonomous drone within 45 minutes of ordering, complete with a complimentary subscription to 'Overthinking Weekly' magazine. CEO Marcus Bighauer III announced at the press conference that the service was inspired by his own need to have his childhood embarrassments delivered to him at work. Early reviews are mixed, with one customer saying 'I ordered my anxiety at 2 PM and it arrived at 2:43 PM, which is actually very efficient for the amount of suffering.'
imagePrompt: A delivery drone dropping a box labeled REGRET at someone's doorstep while they look horrified, comic illustration, flat design, dark purple colors
